feedback: Speed average and data validity is standard at 24 days.
Great speeds in Kozhikode and data lasts all day.
Validity standard but internet speed is impressive.
1.5GB daily data with 30 Mbps speed. Perfect combo.

The 21 day plan validity is standard in the industry nothing to praise or complain about. However the internet speed of 5 Mbps is genuinely impressive and makes this plan worthwhile despite the unremarkable validity period. The extended period gives me peace of mind about staying connected.

Data plan with 28 day validity has simplified my billing routine significantly. Previously on shorter validity plans I would forget to recharge on time and lose connectivity. Now with 28 days I only need to think about it once a month which is much more convenient and stress free.
Getting only 20 Mbps and dta finishes by noon.
Speed data balance and validity all excellent on this plan.
Internet speed is standard and data balance just okay.

Happy with how the data balance works on this plan. The 5GB daily limit resets at midnight and even as a heavy data user I rarely hit the limit before day end. The post limit speed is also usable unlike other operators that throttle to practically unusable speeds.

Speed is excellent in Andheri and data validity of 30 days is reasonable. However network coverage drops in certain areas of main road which means the fast speed and long validity are wasted when I cannot even connect to the network there.

The plan validity of 21 days is standard across the industry so I have no strong feelings about it. It is what it is. Not particularly generous compared to some annual plans but also not as short as some competitors. An average offering that does not stand out either way.
The 24 day validity is ridiculous for Rs 199.
Data balance insufficient and validity too short at 24 days.

The internet speed in Warangal is mediocre at best around 10 Mbps but the 1.5GB daily data balance is generous enough for my modest usage. Speed does not impress but having ample data allocation compensates somewhat for the average throughput experience.
Internet speeds have gotten much worse this month.
Data validity is average at 28 days.
Internet speed is standard. Not fast not slow.
2.5GB daily dta with 30 Mbps spd. Perfect combo.
Speed great but data depletes fast and validity too short.

The internet speed is fast at 30 Mbps in Saket which drains data even faster. The 2.5GB daily balance runs out in under two hours at these speeds and the 24 day validity means I recharge frequently. Good speed but terrible data economics overall.
Speed pathetic in Kozhikode and 1GB daily is not enough.
Plan validity of 14 days is very reasonable.

Speed in Jayanagar is average around 200 Mbps and data balance of 3GB runs out too quickly. At least the 14 day validity is reasonable so I do not have to recharge too often. Mixed feelings about this plan overall.
Ran out of data again by lunchtime. Useless plan.
30 days is passable but could be longer.
The 2.5GB daily allocation is just about okay.

Average dta balance that lasts most days and speed in Pune is poor. The 2GB allocation is neither generous nor stingy but the slow 100 Mbps speed makes even that adequate data hard to enjoy for streaming or downloads. This plan structure works well for my daily usage patterns.

I am experiencing severe speed throttling every single day in Vijayawada after consuming just a fraction of my daily data allocation. The speed drops from decent to practically unusable within a couple of hours of normal usage. Customer support says this is normal fair usage policy but it makes the plan worthless for working professionals.
Speed average data runs out fast but validity decent.
Fast speed generous data and great plan validity.
Plan duration of 14 days is just okay.
Data balance too small but internet speed is excellent.
Speed is functional but unremarkable in Siliguri.

I am extremely frustrated with how quickly the dta balanse depletes on this netwrk. The 2.5GB daily allocation is supposedly enough but in practice it runs out much faster than expected. I suspect the data metering is inaccurate because identical usage on my previous operator consumed much less data per session.
The 84 day plan suits my monthly budget well.
Data balance finishes way too quickly every day.

My daily dta balance of 2.5GB is adequate for my average usage days but falls short on heavy days. The plan is neither generous nor stingy. It sits right in the middle ground where I am not constantly stressed about running out but also not carefree about data consumption.
Good plan duration. 28 days works perfectly.

The intrenet spd on this netwrk in Guwahati has become absolutely terrible over the past month and I am losing patience. During peak hours between six and ten PM I can barely load a simple webpage let alone stream anything. spd tests show only 2 Mbps which is completely unacceptable for a plan advertised as high speed.
Fast intrenet and generous dta balanse on this plan.
Never run out of data with my current plan.
Data balance average and validity is average too.

internet speed in navi mumbai outer ring road has been consistently disappointing for the entire two months since i joined this operator. i was promised speeds up to 100 mbps but real world performance brly touches 300 mbps even during off peak hours. this is false advertising and i feel cheated by their marketing.
Fastest mobile internet I have used. 150 Mbps easy.

The Rs 299 plan delivers on all fronts in Delhi. intrenet speed of 30 Mbps is fast and consistent. Daily data balanse of 3GB lasts all day. And the 21 day validity means infrequent reachargs. Complete satisfaction with every aspect of this plan.
Data balance poor speed slow and customer support unhelpful.
Not enough data. 2.5GB per day is too little.
Data balance okay but internet speed terrible in Udaipur.
Validity good speed acceptable but data balance terrible.

i keep running out of data balance by early afternoon despite what i consider normal usage. the 1.5gb daily limit is clearly designed for someone who brly uses their phone. for anyone who works remotely attends video calls or streams content this allocation is completely inadequate and frustrating.
Validity standard but internet speed is impressive in Dehradun commercial zone.

Speed is fantastic at 5 Mbps but the plan validity of only 84 days is frustrating. I have to recharge too frequently and the dates keep shifting. Good speeds but the short validity undermines the otherwise positive experience significantly. The speeds remain stable even during peak evening hours.
Internet speeds have improved massively in Lucknow recently.
200 Mbps speed with only 1GB data and 56 day validity. All bad.

Data balance on my plan is excellent and the rollover feature means unused data from one day carries forward which is a thoughtful addition. I typically use about seventy percent of my daily allocation and the accumulated rollover data acts as a buffer for heavy usage weekends.

Internet speed has been middling in Visakhapatnam for the past few months. Some days I get decent 2 Mbps and other days it drops below that. For my casual usage of social media and messaging it works fine but I would not recommend it to someone who needs consistently fast speeds for work or heavy streaming.
Short validity forces frequent expensive recharges.

Complete disaster of a plan. Internet speed is terrible in Surat at 200 Mbps. Data balance of 1GB runs out in hours. And short 21 day validity means I overpay annually. Switching to a competitor as soon as possible. The speeds remain stable even during peak evening hours.

The 84 day validity caught me off guard multiple times when my plan expired unexpectedly mid-month leaving me without data at critical moments. Other operators clearly mark 28 or 30 day validity which aligns with months. This shorter non-standard period is confusing and customer unfriendly.

The plan validty of 24 days is standard across the industry so I have no strong feelings about it. It is what it is. Not particularly generous compared to some annual plans but also not as short as some competitors. An average offering that does not stand out either way.

i am v unhappy with the 14 day validity on my plan. it does not align with monthly salary cycles which means my recharge dates keep shifting forward and sometimes i get caught without an active plan on important work days. why cannot they simply offer standard 30 day validity like normal.

The dta balance tracking in the app shows exact real time consumption which helps me manage usage throughout the day. Getting 5GB daily and it lasts comfortably for all my needs including work video calls streaming music and browsing. The transparency about balance is appreciated.

The internet speed in Kolkata is mediocre at best around 50 Mbps but the 2.5GB daily data balance is generous enough for my modest usage. Speed does not impress but having ample data allocation compensates somewhat for the average throughput experience.
Happy with the 24 day recharge cycle.

Long 84 day validity which I like but the internet speed in Saket is unbearably slow at 50 Mbps. Good that I do not have to recharge often but what is the point when the actual service quality is so poor throughout the validity period.

The internet speed of 2 Mbps is excellent in Gurgaon but the data balance of only 1GB daily runs out too fast at these speeds. Fast internet with insufficient data is like having a sports car with a tiny fuel tank. Need bigger daily allocation.
Data gets consumed too fast. Need bigger allocation.

The internet speed on this operator has made mobile hotspot a viable alternative to broadband for me in Indore. Getting consistent 10 Mbps throughout the day means I can work from anywhere in the city without worrying about connectivity speed being a bottleneck for productivity.

data validity at 21 days is acceptable though nothing remarkable, it roughly aligns with a monthly cycle which is convenient enough, i would prefer longer validity options but this is in line with what most operators offer at this price point so cant specifically complain about it

For my casual usage of social media and messaging it works fine but I would not recommend it to someone who needs consistently fast speeds for work or heavy streaming.

The data balance tracking seems inaccurate on this network. I am supposedly getting 1GB per day but based on my usage patterns the data seems to deplete much faster than it logically should. Even keeping my phone on WiFi for most of the day the mobile data still runs out unexpectedly quickly.

Speed is excellent in Chennai and data validity of 56 days is reasonable. However network coverage drops in certain areas of electronic city which means the fast speed and long validity are wasted when I cannot even connect to the network there.
intrenet speed is just okay for basic use.

data validity is okay at 30 days but data balance of 2.5gb is genuinely insufficient for normal use, the plan duration is acceptable but what good is a long validity if the daily allocation runs out b4 noon ev day

The plan validity of 28 days is standard across the industry so I have no strong feelings about it. It is what it is. Not particularly generous compared to some annual plans but also not as short as some competitors. An average offering that does not stand out either way.

The internet speed on this network in Whitefield has been consistently outstanding for the entire three months since I upgraded my plan. The internet speed improvement after the recent tower upgrade in Bandra outer ring road has been remarkable and very noticeable. Previously I was getting barely 10 Mbps during peak hours but now it consistently delivers 50 Mbps regardless of time. Streaming gaming and downloads all work seamlessly now.

The intrenet speed in Lucknow is average for what I am paying. Not blazing fast like some premium plans promise but adequate for basic tasks like email browsing and social media. Streaming works on standard definition but struggles with higher qlity. An unremarkable exprnce that meets minimum expectations without exceeding them.

Data balance is okay. I get 1GB per day which lasts if I am mindful about usage. Heavy streaming or video calls will exhaust it but for standard browsing and social media it is adequate. Neither happy nor unhappy with the allocation as it meets basic needs without exceeding expectations.

The internet speed in Aurangabad is mediocre at best around 50 Mbps but the 1.5GB daily data balance is generous enough for my modest usage. Speed does not impress but having ample data allocation compensates somewhat for the average throughput experience.
Speed great but data depletes fast and validity too short in Salem MG road.
Internet speed is standard and data balance just okay in Bhubaneswar university campus.

The 3GB daily data allocation is generous and the 56 day plan validity means infrequent recharges. Together these two features make this plan excellent value. I never run out of data and the long validity means fewer trips to the recharge app.

Data balance of 3GB daily is laughably small and the 14 day validity means I recharge more often than necessary. Together these create a plan that drains my wallet while barely covering my needs. Very unhappy with both aspects of this service.
The validty period is a joke at 30 days.
Fast intrenet and data balanse okay but validty of 24 days is a joke.
speed great and data validity good but network coverage patchy in hinjewadi industrial ra

The Rs 239 plan fails on every metric in Hubli. Speed barely reaches 50 Mbps which is pathetic. Daily data of 2GB finishes before lunch. And the 14 day validity means constant recharges. Not a single redeeming quality. I rely on this for my daily work from home setup.

The data validity of only 56 days on the Rs 349 plan is absolutely ridiculous and feels designed to extract more money from customers. This means I end up recharging thirteen or more times a year instead of twelve which adds up to significant extra cost that is not immediately obvious.

Good internet speed at 100 Mbps and generous 2GB daily data balance. The 5G experience where available adds another speed boost. Overall a solid plan for heavy data users in Rajkot who need reliable fast connectivity throughout the day. This has been a consistent experience throughout my subscription period.
